title: Technical Support & Networks — Climate and Health Partners in Africa
description: Organizations providing non-direct funding but serving as key technical support and network partners in climate change and health work in Africa.

columns.organization: Name of the technical support organization or network
columns.country_or_region: Country or region where the organization is based or operates
columns.type_of_support: List of types of support provided (e.g. Research, Capacity Building, Policy Guidance)
columns.scope: Geographic scope of work — Africa-focused or Global
columns.link_label: Display name of the link (if no direct URL available)

organizations.organization: World Health Organization (WHO) – Climate & Health Programme
